qids.subject: Algorithms
qids.prose: Consider the following C function. int fun1 (int n) { int i, j, k, p, q = 0; for (i = 1; i < n; ++i) { p = 0; for (j = n; j > 1; j = j/2) ++p; for (k = 1; k < p; k = k * 2) ++q; } return q;

qids.subject: Algorithms
qids.prose: Consider the following C function. int fun(int n) { int x=1, k; if (n==1) return x; for (k=1; k<n; ++k) x = x + fun(k) * fun (n-k); return x; } The return value of is ______.
